title: julia-playground widget params
description: Renders the filled-in Julia set or the Mandelbrot set on an HTML5 <canvas> via escape-time iteration of z_{n+1} = z_n^2 + c. In `mandelbrot` mode the canvas plane is the c-plane and z_0 = 0; in `julia` mode the plane is the z-plane and a fixed parameter c is supplied (and is interactively adjustable via real/imag sliders, plus shift-click on the canvas to pin c). Bounded pan/zoom around the initial view; smooth-iteration coloring with a project-accent palette. The renderer is pure JS in renderScript and runs row-by-row yielded to the event loop so the page stays responsive on parameter changes.

widgetId.description: DOM id for the outer <div class="widget"> wrapper. All inner element ids are derived from this so multiple julia-playground instances on the same page do not collide.

title.description: Display title rendered inside .hd > .ttl. May contain $…$ LaTeX (rendered by the page's KaTeX auto-render).

mode.description: Which set to render. 'mandelbrot' iterates from z_0 = 0 with c read per pixel; 'julia' iterates from z_0 read per pixel with c held fixed at (cReal, cImag).

cReal.description: Initial real part of c, only used when mode = 'julia'. The c slider lets the reader vary it at runtime.

cImag.description: Initial imaginary part of c, only used when mode = 'julia'.

maxIterations.description: Escape-time iteration cap. Higher = sharper boundary but slower render.

width.description: Canvas width in CSS pixels (also the number of plane samples horizontally). The CSS layout caps the rendered size at 100% of the container, so this is also a quality knob.

palette.description: Project accent color used as the warm end of the gradient. The palette is a smooth ramp from var(--bg) through var(--mute) to the chosen accent; interior points (no escape) are rendered in var(--ink).

minZoomSpan.description: Minimum allowed (xmax - xmin) span. Prevents zooming in past visual usefulness given the iteration cap.

maxZoomSpan.description: Maximum allowed (xmax - xmin) span. Prevents zooming out into pure black.

sectionComment.description: ARTIFACT. Optional banner comment preserved when migrating sources, emitted as `/* <sectionComment> */` between the leading <script> tag and the IIFE opener.
